hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git push'; then echo '{"continue":true}'; exit 0; fi; if ! git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^web/src/'; then echo '{"continue":true}'; exit 0; fi; SENTINEL="/tmp/.playwright-verified-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -f "$SENTINEL" ]; then echo '{"continue":true}'; exit 0; fi; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Smoke tests not verified for this commit. Run: npx playwright test (both desktop + mobile), or use /push which handles this automatically."}}'
